# iyaki.ar

> Personal portfolio and blog of Iván Yakimovicz, product engineer and software architect in Argentina. Content in Spanish about software engineering, technical leadership, and product management.

Static site generated with Eleventy (11ty). No invasive trackers, no third-party JavaScript except for comments (giscus) and anonymized analytics (GoatCounter).

## Main sections

- [Home](https://iyaki.ar/) - Professional introduction and project links
- [Blog](https://iyaki.ar/blog/) - Articles on development, architecture, and technology
- [Projects](https://iyaki.ar/projects/) - Tools, experiments, and personal work
- [Curriculum](https://iyaki.ar/resources/CV%20IVAN%20YAKIMOVICZ.pdf) - CV in PDF

## Featured articles

- [Devcontainers: de cero a cien](https://iyaki.ar/posts/20250304_devcontainers_de_cero_a_cien/20250304_devcontainers_de_cero_a_cien.html) - Practical guide to development containers
- [Conoce tus herramientas](https://iyaki.ar/posts/20240121_conoce_tus_herramientas/20240121_conoce_tus_herramientas.html) - The importance of mastering your daily toolkit
- [No solo de software vive el hombre](https://iyaki.ar/posts/20240328_no_solo_de_software_vive_el_hombre/20240328_no_solo_de_software_vive_el_hombre.html) - Laws and principles for project management (Pareto, Conway, Brooks)
- [.gitconfig](https://iyaki.ar/posts/20240224_gitconfig/20240224_gitconfig.html) - My personal git configuration for programming

## Notable projects

- [Simple Newsletter](https://simple-newsletter.com/) - Free service that converts RSS feeds into email newsletters
- [Curated](https://curated.iyaki.ar/) - Curated content aggregator
- [SpecRalph](https://github.com/iyaki/specralph) - Cross-platform implementation of Ralph Wiggum Loops for iterative development with AI agents
- [skills-update](https://github.com/iyaki/skills-update) - GitHub Action that keeps agent skills updated in CI

## Contact

- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/ivan-yakimovicz/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/iyaki

- [Atom Feed](https://iyaki.ar/posts/feed.xml) - Blog RSS/Atom feed
